note: protocol-registry.html: 'How to register a SOST capsule' section rewritten with a 'Which method is right for me?' decision card (side-by-side Wallet vs CLI comparison + criterion table), 'Before you start' prerequisite callouts for both methods, 'What you should see at each step' visual cues inside Method A so first-time users can self-verify, a 'Common gotchas' callout under Method A (no Open Note dropdown, counter over 80, insufficient funds, tx stuck in mempool), and an 8-item FAQ at the end (what is a capsule, do I pay extra, can I edit, can someone forge it, dropdown missing, is this a patent, do I need a node, lost key). Worked example, Step 1 SHA-256 path, Method B sost-cli command, After-publishing verification block and the worked-example summary table are preserved verbatim. Meta tag bumped in lockstep (v312 -> v313) per the procedure that fixed the auto-reload infinite loop.
